creator: eduardo@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hello,

Building with poudriere and I get checksum mismatch error:

~~~~~
===> Fetching all distfiles required by cliqz-1.24.2_2 for building
===>  License MPL20 accepted by the user
===> Fetching all distfiles required by cliqz-1.24.2_2 for building
=> SHA256 Checksum mismatch for adult-domains.bin.
=> SHA256 Checksum OK for cliqz@cliqz.com.xpi.
=> SHA256 Checksum OK for https-everywhere@cliqz.com.xpi.
=> SHA256 Checksum OK for gdprtool@cliqz.com.xpi.
=> SHA256 Checksum OK for cliqz-oss-browser-f-1.24.2_GH0.tar.gz.
===>  Giving up on fetching files:  adult-domains.bin 
Make sure the Makefile and distinfo file (/usr/ports/www/cliqz/distinfo)
are up to date.  If you are absolutely sure you want to override this
check, type "make NO_CHECKSUM=yes [other args]".
*** Error code 1

Stop.
make[1]: stopped in /usr/ports/www/cliqz
*** Error code 1

Stop.
make: stopped in /usr/ports/www/cliqz
=>> Cleaning up wrkdir
===>  Cleaning for cliqz-1.24.2_2
build of www/cliqz | cliqz-1.24.2_2 ended at Thu Mar  7 00:30:15 WET 2019
build time: 00:01:19
!!! build failure encountered !!!
~~~~~

Thanks,

Nuno Teixeira
